metadata.description: A curated collection of Claude Code plugins by Thomas Klok Rohde

plugins.name: drawio
plugins.description: Create production-ready DrawIO diagram files with comprehensive XML knowledge for flowcharts, architecture diagrams, UML, network diagrams, and more

plugins.name: jarchi
plugins.description: Commands and skills for jArchi scripting: automate Archi models, views, and exports

plugins.name: archimate
plugins.description: ArchiMate enterprise architecture modeling assistance - element selection, relationships, patterns, and model quality guidance

plugins.name: create-plan
plugins.description: Generate self-contained, agent-executable Execution Plans (ExecPlans) from PRD files

plugins.name: copilot-customization
plugins.description: Create, scaffold, and configure GitHub Copilot customizations for VS Code projects, including instructions, prompts, agents, skills, hooks, and MCP integration

plugins.name: improve-skill
plugins.description: Analyze and improve existing Claude Code skills using research-backed SkillsBench findings — audit, score, and optimize skills for maximum effectiveness

plugins.name: plugin-integrator
plugins.description: Package standalone skills into properly structured plugins and register them in the Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create new skills, modify and improve existing skills, and measure skill performance with iterative eval-driven development loops

plugins.name: prd-writer
plugins.description: Write enterprise-ready, agent-executable Product Requirements Documents (PRDs) through interactive guided sessions with ambiguity tracking

plugins.name: augment-plan
plugins.description: Augment existing Execution Plans with agent-first CLI design requirements and project scaffolding guidance

plugins.name: sapphire-design
plugins.description: Approximate Danske Bank's Sapphire design system using plain CSS and HTML — no @danske/sapphire-* packages required. Includes complete design tokens, 20+ component patterns, and 700+ icons.

plugins.name: blackbox-test
plugins.description: Run isolated blackbox tests of any CLI tool — a zero-knowledge subagent explores, stress-tests, and reports bugs without reading source code

plugins.name: api-anything
plugins.description: Generate enterprise-ready, agent-first CLIs from OpenAPI/Swagger specs with normalized commands, enterprise auth profiles, structured output contracts, and multi-layered validation

plugins.name: copilot-manager
plugins.description: Discover, audit, reconcile, modify, and delete GitHub Copilot customizations across both Copilot IDE (VS Code) and Copilot CLI environments

plugins.name: autoresearch
plugins.description: Autonomous agent-driven optimization loop — iteratively modify an artifact, evaluate against a scalar metric, and keep improvements. Works with any domain: code performance, prompt engineering, config tuning, SQL, builds, and more.

plugins.name: earos-rubric
plugins.description: Create architecture evaluation rubrics (profiles and overlays) conforming to the Enterprise Architecture Rubric Operational Standard (EAROS) through structured interviews with ambiguity reduction

plugins.name: apply-rubric
plugins.description: Apply EAROS rubrics to architecture artifacts using the three-pass agent evaluation pattern (Extractor, Evaluator, Challenger) with optional parallel evaluators for comprehensive artifacts
